SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-24-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-24-2026 BY JUDGE PRO TEM FLEISIG. PLAINTIFF JAMES DRUMMOND IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT THEO GEORGE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT SEPTEMBER ROSE IS PRESENT. PROOFS OF SERVICE ON FILE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID FLEISIG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-24-2026 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DRUMMOND, JAMES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GEORGE, THEO JAMES ROSE, SEPTEMBER $3,862.64 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,962.64 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
